# Lux Financial API Documentation Index

> Documentation for the Lux Financial API - move into, out of, and between any form of a dollar.

## Base Information

- API Base URL: https://api.lux.financial/v0
- Documentation URL: https://docs.lux.financial
- OpenAPI Spec: https://api.lux.financial/openapi.json

## Core API Resources

### Customers
- Create customers with KYC verification
- Individual and business customer types
- GET /v0/customers - List customers
- POST /v0/customers - Create customer
- GET /v0/customers/{id} - Get customer
- PATCH /v0/customers/{id} - Update customer
- POST /v0/customers/{id}/kyc - Submit KYC documents

### Accounts
- Multi-currency fiat accounts
- GET /v0/accounts - List accounts
- POST /v0/accounts - Create account
- GET /v0/accounts/{id} - Get account
- GET /v0/accounts/{id}/balance - Get balance
- GET /v0/accounts/{id}/transactions - List transactions

### Wallets
- Custodial and MPC self-custody wallets
- Multi-chain support (Polygon, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Lux)
- GET /v0/wallets - List wallets
- POST /v0/wallets - Create wallet
- GET /v0/wallets/{id} - Get wallet
- GET /v0/wallets/{id}/balance - Get wallet balance

### Transfers
- Move funds between accounts and wallets
- Account to wallet (stablecoin mint)
- Wallet to account (stablecoin redeem)
- Wallet to wallet (on-chain transfer)
- GET /v0/transfers - List transfers
- POST /v0/transfers - Create transfer
- GET /v0/transfers/{id} - Get transfer

### Payments
- Cross-border payments to 150+ countries
- Local currency payout via SPEI, PIX, UPI, FAST, SEPA
- GET /v0/payments - List payments
- POST /v0/payments - Create payment
- GET /v0/payments/{id} - Get payment

### External Accounts
- Bank accounts (ACH, SWIFT, SEPA, SPEI, PIX)
- Crypto addresses (Polygon, Ethereum, Arbitrum)
- GET /v0/external-accounts - List external accounts
- POST /v0/external-accounts - Create external account
- POST /v0/external-accounts/{id}/verify - Verify bank account

### Stablecoins
- Native USDC, USDT, PYUSD, EURC support
- Multi-chain deployment
- GET /v0/stablecoins - List supported stablecoins
- GET /v0/stablecoins/{asset}/rates - Get conversion rates

### Rewards
- Yield on stablecoin balances
- GET /v0/rewards/rates - Get current reward rates
- GET /v0/wallets/{id}/rewards - Get wallet rewards
- POST /v0/wallets/{id}/rewards/enable - Enable rewards

### Webhooks
- Real-time event notifications
- GET /v0/webhooks - List webhooks
- POST /v0/webhooks - Create webhook
- DELETE /v0/webhooks/{id} - Delete webhook

## Authentication

All requests require an API key in the Api-Key header:

```
Api-Key: sk_live_your_api_key
```

## Key Features

### Stablecoin Infrastructure
- Native USDC, USDT, PYUSD support
- Polygon, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Lux chains
- Real-time settlement (<3 seconds)

### Enterprise Security
- Lux KMS: HSM-backed key management
- Lux MPC: Threshold signing (2-of-3, 3-of-5)
- Post-quantum cryptography (CRYSTALS-Dilithium)

### AI Integration
- MCP Server for AI-powered operations
- ZAP Protocol for browser-AI communication
- Natural language banking queries

## SDKs

```bash
# TypeScript
npm install @luxbank/sdk

# Python
pip install luxbank

# Go
go get github.com/luxfi/sdk-go
```

## Support

- Documentation: https://docs.lux.financial
- API Status: https://status.lux.financial
- Contact: api-support@lux.financial
